---

Thanks for improving Pixel Year's translations! 🙏

**Language** (code + name): <!-- e.g. pl — Polish -->

**What's off / suggested fixes**
List the key(s) from [`i18n.js`](../../blob/main/i18n.js) and your suggestion:

| key | current | suggested |
| --- | --- | --- |
| e.g. `overlay2` | … | … |
|  |  |  |

**Notes (optional)**
<!-- Tone, terminology, regional preferences, etc. -->

---
Guidelines: keep the **keys** unchanged, keep placeholders intact (`{name} {year} {cell} {max} {err}`),
keep `"Year in Pixels"` in English. You can also just open a Pull Request editing `i18n.js` directly.
See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
